criteria.label: Payoff concreteness
criteria.notes: 1000 dims to 10, >90% variance, single matrix multiply. Loses 1pp because 90% figure is illustrative.

criteria.label: Staircase coherence
criteria.notes: Six rungs prerequisite. Minor: rung 1 and rung 2 could be slightly merged.

criteria.label: Destination precision
criteria.notes: Names formula Cu = lambda u, identifies u and lambda, states ordering and mechanism.

criteria.label: Narration clarity
criteria.notes: Most symbols defined. Minor: 'outer product' jargon not unpacked; x_i used before formal definition.

criteria.label: Board specificity
criteria.notes: Data cloud, PC1 arrow, projection diagram, eigen_box all concrete. Minor erase ambiguity.

criteria.label: Board coherence
criteria.notes: Mostly clean. Minor issues: gradient_eq highlight overlaps with eigen_box (both emphasize same content); top-right region accumulates 5 elements without erase.

criteria.label: Board visual balance
criteria.notes: Four draws plus annotations. Loses 1pp because PC2 mentioned but never drawn orthogonal to PC1 on data cloud.

criteria.label: Math and notation correctness
criteria.notes: All formulas correct. lambda transitions cleanly from Lagrange multiplier to eigenvalue.

criteria.label: Code-content decision
criteria.notes: No code; defensible for derivation. Small missed bridge to np.linalg.eigh given payoff mentions 'single matrix multiply'.

criteria.label: Pacing and density
criteria.notes: Eight beats / 240s averages 30s/beat. Lagrange beat at t=110 runs 40s -- slightly dense.

criteria.label: Redundancy and focus
criteria.notes: Stays focused. Eigenvalue=variance reinforced at t=150 and t=185 -- slight repetition.

topThreeIssues: Top-right region congestion: by t=215 holds goal_label, cov_matrix_def, constraint_label, ranking_label, pc2_note simultaneously without erasure
PC2 mentioned in narration but never drawn orthogonal to PC1 on data cloud; missed visual reinforcement of orthogonality
Lagrange-multiplier beat at t=110 (40s) packs Lagrangian + gradient + eigenvector conclusion in one beat; split for clarity
summary: Strong plan correctly deriving eigenvector condition from constrained variance maximization with precise notation, well-ordered staircase, and concrete board actions. Main weaknesses: top-right canvas clutter, missed PC2 visual, slightly dense Lagrange beat.
